segments.text: First, listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why did Patrick keep on asking the same question?

translations.zh-Hans: 帕特里克为什么一再问同一个问题？
前首相温特沃思·莱恩先生。

segments.text: Wentworth Lane, was defeated in the recent elections.

translations.zh-Hans: 在最近的选举中落败了。

segments.text: Patrick has always been a fanatical opponent of Mr.

translations.zh-Hans: 帕特里克一向是莱恩先生所领导的
激进进步党的狂热反对者。

segments.text: After the elections, Patrick went to the former Prime Minister's house.

translations.zh-Hans: 选举结束后，帕特里克来到前首相的住所。
他询问莱恩先生是否住在那里。

segments.text: Lane lived there, the policeman on duty told him that since his defeat, the ex-Prime Minister had gone abroad.

translations.zh-Hans: 值勤警察告诉他，自从落选后，这位前首相已经出国了。

segments.text: On the following day, Patrick went to the house again.

translations.zh-Hans: 第二天，帕特里克又来到那所房子。

segments.text: The same policeman was just walking slowly past the entrance when Patrick asked the same question.

translations.zh-Hans: 同一名警察正在门口缓缓巡逻，帕特里克又问了同样的问题。

segments.text: Though a little suspicious this time, the policeman gave him the same answer.

translations.zh-Hans: 警察这次虽然有些疑心，还是给了他同样的回答。

segments.text: The day after, Patrick went to the house once more and asked exactly the same question.

translations.zh-Hans: 又过了一天，帕特里克再次来到那所房子，问了完全相同的问题。

segments.text: This time, the policeman lost his temper.
I told you yesterday and the day before yesterday, he shouted.

translations.zh-Hans: “我昨天和前天都告诉过你了，”他喊道。

segments.text: Lane was defeated in the elections.
He has retired from political life and gone to live abroad.

translations.zh-Hans: “他已经退出政坛，搬到国外生活去了。”

segments.text: I know, answered Patrick, but I love to hear you say it.

translations.zh-Hans: “我知道，”帕特里克回答，“但我就是喜欢听你这么说。”
